description_long: This house features a whimsical, storybook design with a steeply pitched red-tiled roof, prominent stone chimney, and exposed timber framing. The front facade includes a central arched doorway flanked by two wooden columns and a pair of small, round stools, with a decorative overhang above. The left side of the house has a covered extension with orange shingles and timber supports, possibly serving as a storage or work area. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with arched and circular panes set into the stone and timber walls. The exterior combines stone, wood, and tile, giving it a rustic, medieval European cottage appearance. Decorative details such as wooden beams, a hanging barrel, and textured roof tiles add to its charm and visual interest.
description: A whimsical, medieval-style house with a steep red-tiled roof, stone chimney, timber framing, and asymmetrical windows. Features include a covered side extension, decorative woodwork, and a rustic, storybook appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main arched entryway, two small stools, stone chimney, and decorative timber framing.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the orange-shingled extension, timber supports, and the narrow profile of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a circular window, stone chimney, and the continuation of the red-tiled roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two arched windows, a hanging barrel, and visible timber beams.
attribute_entryway_design: Arched wooden door with stone steps, flanked by timber columns and a small overhang, featuring decorative woodwork and two stools.
